description:
OpenXR hand tracking or PointCTRL cockpit interactions for DCS and MSFS


Start by downloading the MSI installer, then read Getting Started.
HTCC continues to support DCS and MSFS 2020; support for MSFS 2024 is not included, however some users have had success and shared their settings on Discord.
- ✨ Added 'grab and move to scroll' option - thanks to @haoxv !
- 🔒 Settings app no longer automatically runs as admin; it will ask for admin when settings are changed
